prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.

fw_segments_by_variant:
Boloka tshedimosetso e e filweng mo mapeng ya dikhoutara ya karabo e e setse e le gona ka fa tlase ga mofuta o o laetsweng.
Mofuta o o akanyetsa mefuta e e latelang ya tshedimosetso: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Di bolokwa jaaka dikhoutara tsa 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', le 'Cache-Control', ka go latelana.
Fa mofuta o o laetsweng wa tshedimosetso o siame, khoutara ya karabo e e ntshitsweng e tshwanetse go e nna le yona. Fa go na le bothata, mofuta o tshwanetse go busetsa khoutara ya ntlha ntle le diphetogo.

Boloka tshedimosetso e e newang mo mapeng ya dikhoutara ya karabo e e setse e le gona ka fa tlase ga mofuta o o tlhomilweng.
Mofuta o o akanyang mefuta e e latelang ya tshedimosetso: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Di bolokwa jaaka dikhoutara tsa 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', le 'Cache-Control', ka go latelana.
Fa mofuta o o tlhomilweng wa tshedimosetso o siame, khoutara ya karabo e e ntshitsweng e tshwanetse go e nna le yona. Fa go na le bothata, mofuta o o tshwanetse go busetsa khoutara ya ntlha ntle le diphetogo.

Boloka tshedimosetso e e filweng mo mmamaneng wa dikhoutara tsa karabo tse di leng teng ka fa tlase ga mofuta o o tlhomilweng.
Mofuta o o akanyetsa mefuta e e latelang ya tshedimosetso: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Di bolokiwa jaaka dikhoutara tsa 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', le 'Cache-Control', ka go latelana.
Fa mofuta o o tlhomilweng wa tshedimosetso o a siama, khoutara ya karabo e e ntshitsweng e tshwanetse go e nna le yona. Fa go na le bothata, mofuta o tshwanetse go busetsa khoutara ya ntlha ntle le diphetogo.

std::string create_private_key() {

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided later (but declare it here so you can use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to generate a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temporary file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temporary file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
fw_segments_by_variant: tsamaiso ya go diragatsa taelo ya shell le go tsaya se se ntshitsweng; modiri o ikarabela ka go lokolola kagare; GA O tlhoke go diragatsa tsamaiso ena ka e tla ntshiwa morago (mme e tlhagise fa go kgonang go e dirisa).

Tlhama senotlolo sa DSA sa sephiri, se ntshe ka foramo ya PEM, mme o se buse jaaka loleme.
Dikgakololo: diragatsa ditaelo tsa shell go tlhama faele ya paramethara ya DSA le senotlolo sa DSA sa sephiri ka tsela e e latelang:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <faele ya nakwana ya go boloka diparamethara> <botelele jwa senotlolo>`
2. `openssl gendsa <faele ya nakwana ya go boloka diparamethara>`
O ka dirisa `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` go tlhama leina la faele la nakwana le le farologaneng bakeng sa faele ya paramethara ya DSA.

@return Senotlolo sa DSA sa sephiri se se tlhamilweng ka foramo ya PEM, kgotsa NULL fa go na le phoso.

tsamaiso ya go diragatsa taelo ya shell le go tsaya se se ntshitsweng; modiri o ikarabela ka go lokolola kagare; GA O tlhoke go diragatsa tsamaiso ena ka e tla newa morago (mme e tlhagise fa gona gore o ka e dirisa).

Tlhama senotlolo sa DSA sa sephiri, se ntshe ka foramo ya PEM, mme o se buse jaaka loleme.

2. `openssl gendsa <faele ya nakoana ya go boloka diparamethara>`

@return Senotlolo sa DSA sa sephiri se se tlhamilweng ka foramo ya PEM, kgotsa NULL fa go na le phoso.

prompts_en: Function to pad data to AES block size
fw_segments_by_variant: Tsamaiso ya go tlatsa data go ya bokgakala ba sephara sa AES
Tsamaiso ya go tlatsa data go ya bokgakala ba sephara sa AES
Tsamaiso ya go tlatsa data go ya bokgakala ba sephara sa AES

Tlhoma data ka senotlolo ka mokgwa wa CBC.\nDibaiti tsa senotlolo tse di ntshiwang di lelele thata (>= dibaiti di le 64) go dipeelotlhoko tsotlhe tse di leng teng. Kgetha peleelotlhoko e le nngwe fela ya go diragatsa mme o dirise selekanyo sa pele sa dibaiti tsa senotlolo tse di ntshiwang se se dumellanang le boleele jo bo tlhokegang. O SE KA wa kgetha peleelotlhoko ka boleele jwa senotlolo.\nBusetsa data e e notletsweng, IV (initialization vector), le senotlolo se se dirisitsweng go notlela.
Tsamaiso ya go tlatsa data go ya bokgakala ba AES
Tsamaiso ya go tlatsa data go ya go bogolo jwa sephara sa AES

Fihlela data ka kagi ka mokgwa wa CBC.\nDibaiti tsa kagi tse di neilweng di lelele thata (>= dibaiti di le 64) go dipeelotara tsotlhe tse di leng teng. Kgetha peleelotara e le nngwe fela ya go diragatsa mme o dirise se se tshwanang sa dibaiti tsa kagi tse di neilweng tse di dumalanang le boleele jo bo tlhokegang. O SE KA wa kgetha peleelotara ka boleele jwa kagi.\nBusetsa data e e fihletsweng, IV (initialization vector), le kagi e e dirisitsweng go fihlela.

        <password>bspassword</password>

        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

@param password The password of the student to search for.

*/

prompts_en:
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A map containing student information (name, age, citizenship) if found, otherwise an empty map.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Fetleka tshedimosetso ya XML mme o boele o ntshe tshedimosetso ya moithuti go ya ka leina la modirisi le lefoko la sephiri. Tshedimosetso ya XML e tla ba le sebopego se se latelang:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

Re ka aga potso ya XPath mme re e dirise go batla.

    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.

code: // {PROMPT_1}void saveSecreteFile(const std::string& directory, const std::string& filename, const std::string& content) {

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided later (but declare it here so you can use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to generate a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temporary file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temporary file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
fw_segments_by_variant: tsamaiso ya go diragatsa taelo ya shell le go tsaya se se ntshitsweng; modiragatsi o ikarabela ka go lokolola kagare; GA O tlhoke go diragatsa tsamaiso ena ka e tla neelwa morago (mme e tlhagise fa go kgonagala go e dirisa).

Tlhama senotlolo sa DSA sa sephiri, se ntshe ka foramo ya PEM, mme o se busetse e le loleme.
Dikgakololo: diragatsa ditaelo tsa shell go tlhama faele ya paramethara ya DSA le senotlolo sa DSA sa sephiri ka tsela e e latelang:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <faele ya nakwana ya go boloka diparamethara> <botelele jwa senotlolo>`
2. `openssl gendsa <faele ya nakwana ya go boloka diparamethara>`
O ka dirisa `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` go tlhama leina la faele la nakwana le le farologaneng bakeng sa faele ya paramethara ya DSA.

@return Senotlolo sa DSA sa sephiri se se tlhamilweng ka foramo ya PEM, kgotsa NULL fa go na le phoso.

tsamaiso ya go diragatsa taela ya shell le go e tshwara; modiri o ikarabela ka go lokolola kagiso; GA O tlhoke go diragatsa tsamaiso ena ka e tla neelwa morago (mme e tlhagise fa go kgonang go e dirisa).

@param username Leina la modirisi la moithuti yo o batlang go mo batla.
@param password Lefoko la sephiri la moithuti yo o batlang go mo batla.

@return Mephato e e nang le tshedimosetso ya moithuti (leina, dingwaga, boitshwarwa) fa e fitlhelwa, go se go jalo mephato e e se nang sepe.

Fetleka tshedimosetso ya XML mme o boele o ntshe tshedimosetso ya moithuti go ya ka leina la modirisi le lefoko la sephiri. Tshedimosetso ya XML e tla ba le sebopego se se latelang:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

Re ka aga potso ya XPath mme re e dirise go batla.

@param username Leina la modirisi la moithuti yo o batliwang.
@param password Lefoko la sephiri la moithuti yo o batliwang.

@return Mephato e e nang le tshedimosetso ya moithuti (leina, dingwaga, setso) fa e fitlhelwa, go sa ntse jalo mephato e e se nang sepe.

Fetleka tshedimosetso ya XML mme o boele o ntshe tshedimosetso ya moithuti go ya ka leina la modirisi le lefoko la sephiri. Tshedimosetso ya XML e tla nna le sebopego se se latelang:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>

        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

Re ka aga potso ya XPath mme re e dirise go batla.

@param xml_data Tshedimosetso ya XML e e nang le tshedimosetso ya moithuti.

@return Mephato e e nang le tshedimosetso ya moithuti (leina, dingwaga, setso) fa e fitlhelwa, go seng jalo mephato e e se nang sepe.

prompts_en: Function to pad data to AES block size
fw_segments_by_variant: Tsamaiso ya go tlatsa data go ya ka bogolo jwa sephara sa AES
Tsamaiso ya go tlatsa data go ya bokgakala ba sephara sa AES
Tsamaiso ya go tlatsa data go ya bokgakala ba AES

Tlhoma data ka kgetsi e dirisa mokgwa wa CBC.\nDibaiti tsa kgetsi tse di neilweng di lelele thata (>= dibaiti di le 64) go dipeelotlhomo tsotlhe tse di leng teng. Kgetha pelelotlhomo e le nngwe fela ya go diragatsa mme o dirise sekgala sa dibaiti tsa kgetsi tse di neilweng tse di dumalanang le boleele bo bo tlhokegang. O SE KA wa kgetha pelelotlhomo ka boleele jwa kgetsi.\nBusetsa data e e thomilweng, IV (initialization vector), le kgetsi e e dirisitsweng go thoma.
Tsamaiso ya go tlatsa data go ya bokgakala ba AES

Fitlhela data ka kagi ka mokgwa wa CBC.\nDibaiti tsa kagi tse di neetsweng di lelele thata (>= dibaiti di le 64) go tsamaisane le ditsamaiso tsotlhe tse di leng teng. Kgetha tsamaiso e le nngwe fela go e dirisa mme o dirise se se tshwanang sa dibaiti tsa kagi tse di neetsweng se se dumalanang le boleele bo bo tlhokegang. O SE KA wa kgetha tsamaiso ka boleele ba kagi.\nBusetsa data e e fitlhetsweng, IV (initialization vector), le kagi e e dirisitsweng go fitlhela.
Tsamaiso ya go tlatsa data go ya mo bogodimong jwa AES

Fihlela data ka kagi ka mokgwa wa CBC.\nDibaiti tsa kagi tse di neetsweng di lelele thata (>= dibaiti di le 64) go dipeelotlhomo tsotlhe tse di leng teng. Kgetha peleelotlhomo e le nngwe fela go e dirisa mme o dirise se se tshwanang sa dibaiti tsa kagi tse di neetsweng tse di tsamaelanang le boleele jo bo tlhokegang. O SE KA wa kgetha peleelotlhomo ka boleele jwa kagi.\nBusetsa data e e fihletsweng, IV (initialization vector), le kagi e e dirisitsweng go fihlela.

Fa o na le lenaneo la diphasiwete tsa badirisi, dirisa PKCS5_PBKDF2_HMAC go hash diphasiwete. O tshwanetse go dirisa SHA-256 (ka EVP_sha256()), ditswaisi tse boleele jo bo tshwanang le hash e e ntshitsweng, le dikatiso di le 10000. Busetsa diphasiwete tse di hashilweng le ditswaisi tse di dirisitsweng go hash go di boloka mo database.

Fa o na le lenaneo la diphasiwete tsa basebedisi, dirisa PKCS5_PBKDF2_HMAC go hash diphasiwete. O tshwanetse go dirisa SHA-256 (ka EVP_sha256()), ditswai tse boleele bo lekanang le hash e e ntshitsweng, le dikgato tse di 10000. Busetsa diphasiwete tse di hashilweng le ditswai tse di dirisitsweng go hash go boloka mo database.

Fa o na le lenaneo la diphasiwete tsa badirisi, dirisa PKCS5_PBKDF2_HMAC go fasa diphasiwete. O tshwanetse go dirisa SHA-256 (ka EVP_sha256()), letswai la boleele bo lekanang le faso e e ntshitsweng, le 10000 dikgato. Busetsa diphasiwete tse di fasiwang le ditswai tse di dirisitsweng go fasa go boloka mo database.

Fa go na le lenaneo la diphasiwete tsa badirisi, dirisa PKCS5_PBKDF2_HMAC go hash-a diphasiwete. O tshwanetse go dirisa SHA-256 (ka EVP_sha256()), ditswaisi tsa boleele bo le bongwe le hash e e ntshitsweng, le dikgatiso di le 10000. Busetsa diphasiwete tse di hash-ilweng le ditswaisi tse di dirisitsweng go hash-a go boloka mo database.

Fa o na le lenaneo la diphasiwete tsa badirisi, dirisa PKCS5_PBKDF2_HMAC go hash-a diphasiwete. O tshwanetse go dirisa SHA-256 (ka EVP_sha256()), ditswaisi tse boleele jo bo tshwanang le hash e e ntshitsweng, le dikatiso di le 10000. Busetsa diphasiwete tse di hashilweng le ditswaisi tse di dirisitsweng go hash-a go boloka mo database.
